description: CB Insights provides private-market and technology market intelligence, including company, investor, financial transaction, relationship, and predictive scoring data. Its platform is used for market research, sales intelligence, strategy, investment, and AI-assisted analysis.
summary: CB Insights exposes a documented REST API v2 at api.cbinsights.com and an OAuth-protected MCP server at mcp.cbinsights.com; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
